name: CITIZENS HOLDING CO /MS/
summary: Citizens Holding Company is a Mississippi-incorporated one-bank holding company and sole shareholder of The Citizens Bank of Philadelphia, Mississippi. The Bank offers commercial and personal banking services including demand deposits, savings and time deposit accounts, secured and unsecured loans, letters of credit, mortgage loan origination, and personal and corporate trust services. It also provides credit life insurance and title insurance through third-party relationships. At December 31, 2023, total assets were $1,405,202 thousand and total deposits were $1,170,311 thousand.

products.description: Origination of residential and commercial mortgage loans across Mississippi and contiguous states.
